title: COINS AND MONEY
description: This mod adds new currencies for trading, such as gold, silver and bills, and you can use them however you want, such as for roleplay, to trade with friends, whatever you want.
body:
COINS AND MONEY

ES

This mod adds new currencies for trading, such as gold, silver and bills, and you can use them however you want, such as for roleplay, to trade with friends, whatever you want.

This mod is constantly updated, therefore we will add more content soon.


1 GOLD COIN = 4 SILVER COIN

1 SILVER COIN = 4 COPPER COIN

1 GOLD COIN = 16 COPPER COIN

Contains:

- Silver Coin
- Gold Coin
- Gold Coin
- Dollar/Bill
- Chocolate Coin
- Wrapped Chocolate Coin
- Strong Box
- Villagers Trade


Creator by: @d_de_diego_d

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________________

ES

Este mod añade nuevas monedas para el comercio, como las de oro plata y el billete, y tu las podras dar el uso que quieras, como para roleplay, para tradear con amigos, lo que quieras.

Este mod se actualiza constantemente, por lo tanto meteremos mas contenido proximamente.


1 GOLD COIN = 4 SILVER COIN

1 SILVER COIN = 4 COPPER COIN

1 GOLD COIN = 16 COPPER COIN

Contiene:

- Moneda de Plata
- Moneda de Oro
- Dolar
- Moneda de Cobre
- Moneda de Chocolate
- Envoltorio de Moneda de Chocolate
- Caja Fuerte
- Tradeos Con Aldeanos


Creador por: @d_de_diego_d
